records.ety: [L. promiscuus; pro before, in place of, for + miscere to mix. See Mix. ]

defs: Consisting of individuals united in a body or mass without order; mingled; confused; undistinguished; as, a promiscuous crowd or mass.
quotes: A wild, where weeds and flowers promiscuous shoot.

defs: Distributed or applied without order or discrimination; not restricted to an individual; common; indiscriminate; as, promiscuous love or intercourse.
